query:
SELECT emailKey, stage, subject, sentAt
FROM recruitment_emails_sent
WHERE prospectId = 90018
ORDER BY sentAt DESC;

SELECT applicationData, applicationSubmittedAt, pipelineStage, updatedAt
FROM recruitment_prospects
WHERE id = 90018;
